# istiod replica 0 of a multi-replica (fanned-out) control plane.
# HELP pilot_xds Number of endpoints connected to this pilot using XDS.
# TYPE pilot_xds gauge
# Two label permutations whose within-pod TOTAL is 5 (ads 3 + grpc 2). The
# fanout must sum BOTH permutations within the pod (PL12 axis 1) before summing
# across pods (axis 2) -> pod0 5 + pod1 7 = 12.
pilot_xds{type="ads"} 3
pilot_xds{type="grpc"} 2
# HELP pilot_services Total services known to pilot.
# TYPE pilot_services gauge
pilot_services 42
# HELP pilot_xds_pushes Pilot build and send errors for lds, rds, cds and eds.
# TYPE pilot_xds_pushes counter
pilot_xds_pushes{type="cds"} 100
pilot_xds_pushes{type="eds"} 200
pilot_xds_pushes{type="lds"} 100
# HELP pilot_push_triggers Total number of times a push was triggered.
# TYPE pilot_push_triggers counter
pilot_push_triggers{type="endpoint"} 40
pilot_push_triggers{type="config"} 10
# HELP process_start_time_seconds Start time of the process since unix epoch in seconds.
# TYPE process_start_time_seconds gauge
process_start_time_seconds 1.7169408e+09
# HELP pilot_proxy_convergence_time Delay in seconds between config change and a proxy receiving all required configuration.
# TYPE pilot_proxy_convergence_time histogram
pilot_proxy_convergence_time_bucket{le="0.1"} 0
pilot_proxy_convergence_time_bucket{le="0.5"} 30
pilot_proxy_convergence_time_bucket{le="1"} 50
pilot_proxy_convergence_time_bucket{le="3"} 50
pilot_proxy_convergence_time_bucket{le="5"} 50
pilot_proxy_convergence_time_bucket{le="+Inf"} 50
pilot_proxy_convergence_time_sum 18.0
pilot_proxy_convergence_time_count 50
